text:
Frog-In-Waiting (マチボッケ, Machibokke) is a large carnivorous species of frog that hides beneath the ground to catch prey. When a potential prey walks over their hiding spot, they will rise and gobble them up in an instant. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 1, Chapter 8 

Appearance

The Frog-In-Waiting has similar features to that of an average frog, as well as big beady eyes and claws for hands. 

Behavior

It moves at an extremely slow pace. With its mouth wide open, it burrows underground while blending in with the surrounding area in order to trap its prey. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

In the second part of the First Phase of the 287th Hunter Exam, a Frog-In-Waiting ambushes and devours four unsuspecting examinees as they cross its path. 

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

In the 2011 anime adaptation, it is shown that they can't digest laxatives and will throw up if ingested. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 5 (2011)
